channel.title: beautiful-soup on Novica's Website
channel.description: Recent content in beautiful-soup on Novica's Website

item.title: nsp
item.description: A command-line tool for searching and reading the Bible in the new Serbian translation. Fork of Luke Smith’s kjv fork with some changes made for setting up other translations. Repository also comes with a web scraper that scraps the whole bible from BibleGateway’s website, which is what I used to get the NSP bible. usage: nsp [flags] [reference...] -l list books -r random verse -W no line wrap -h show help Reference types: <Book> Individual book <Book>:<Chapter> Individual chapter of a book <Book>:<Chapter>:<Verse>[,<Verse>].
